productLibrary.title: Product Library
productLibrary.empty: No products yet. Add one first.

dialog.importDescription: Paste or enter the product title, category, materials, size/weight, selling points, and usage scenarios.

Product title, category, materials, size/weight, selling points, usage scenarios...
Reference images can be uploaded separately

importPreview.title: Organized Product Facts
importPreview.subtitle: You can still edit manually. The saved product will use your changes.

draft.basicDescription: Title, category, materials, and size are used directly in script and storyboard context.
draft.factsDescription: One item per line. Use the left side for usable benefits and scenarios; keep prohibited claims on the right.
draft.referenceDescription: One local path per line. Saved paths appear as reference assets on the product detail page.
draft.referenceHint: At least 3 reference images are recommended

fileImport.title: Import Product Facts
fileImport.summaryWithProducts: {{count}} products detected. One is selected by default; selecting one fills the current product, selecting multiple saves them to the product list.
fileImport.summaryRowsOnly: {{count}} detail rows detected, but no importable products.
fileImport.unsupportedFile: Only CSV, XLSX, and XLS files are supported.
fileImport.chooseFileHint: After parsing, one product is selected by default. A single selected row fills the product facts box.
fileImport.emptyMessage: No importable product facts were recognized. Make sure the export contains product title, product ID, description, or image fields. SKU-only detail files cannot be imported as product facts.

preflight.title: Generation Preflight
preflight.emptyDescription: Estimated tokens, CNY cost, reference image state, script notes, and the Seedance prompt will appear here.
preflight.officialModelPrice: Estimated from the selected model's official pricing
preflight.byokUpstreamHint: BYOK upstream cost is paid by the user
preflight.currentEstimateHint: Cost reference only; it will not block generation
preflight.readyForPaid: Product facts are ready for paid generation
preflight.notReadyForPaid: Product facts are not ready for paid generation

wallet.title: Balance Center
wallet.billingHint: Platform-hosted models deduct official API cost plus service fee; your own API key only deducts platform service fees.

pricing.title: Official Model Price Snapshot
pricing.subtitle: Switch providers to review text, image, and video generation pricing.
pricing.notice: Prices may change by region, plan, cache hit, or promotion. Use the official pricing page and your bill as the final source of truth.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.summary: The official API pricing page lists rates per 1M tokens, with cached input priced separately.

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.summary: The official pricing page lists rates per 1M tokens and separates cache hits from cache misses.

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.summary: Google Gemini pricing is published by model and generation type. Haitu stores a CNY cost snapshot for wallet billing.

volcengine.name: Volcengine
volcengine.summary: Volcengine Ark lists model prices in CNY. Video estimates also depend on resolution, duration, and whether input video is included.

gpt55.label: Flagship text
gpt55.note: Standard short-context tier pricing. Long context, Flex, and Priority pricing may differ.
gpt55.billingNote: Default estimates use immediate standard pricing. Cached input is an automatic discount for repeated identical prompt prefixes; the first request is usually billed at the normal input price. Batch pricing is only for background batch jobs when the user does not need an immediate result.
gpt55.formula: Text total cost = input tokens / 1M × US$5.00 + output tokens / 1M × US$30.00; cached input uses tokens / 1M × US$0.50

gptImage2.label: Image generation
gptImage2.note: Image generation is billed by image tokens. Text input is billed separately at gpt-5.5 text pricing.
gptImage2.billingNote: Default estimates use immediate standard pricing. Cached image input is an automatic discount when the same image or prompt prefix is reused exactly; first generation is usually billed at the normal image input price. Batch pricing is only for background batch jobs when the user does not need an immediate result.
gptImage2.formula: Image total cost = text input tokens / 1M × US$5.00 + image input tokens / 1M × US$8.00 + image output tokens / 1M × US$30.00

gemini3ProImagePreview.label: Gemini quality image
gemini3ProImagePreview.note: Reference price from Google's Gemini image-generation pricing. Runtime requests still use the real Gemini model ID through the OpenAI-compatible image endpoint.

gemini25FlashImage.label: Gemini fast image
gemini25FlashImage.note: Reference price from Google's Gemini image-generation pricing. Runtime requests still use the real Gemini model ID through the OpenAI-compatible image endpoint.

deepseekV4Flash.label: Fast text
deepseekV4Flash.note: Corresponds to DeepSeek-V4-Flash in the official table. The legacy deepseek-chat model is deprecated after 2026-07-24.
deepseekV4Flash.formula: Text total cost = cache miss input tokens / 1M × US$0.14 + cache hit input tokens / 1M × US$0.0028 + output tokens / 1M × US$0.28

deepseekV4Pro.label: High-quality text
deepseekV4Pro.note: Corresponds to DeepSeek-V4-Pro in the official table. Suitable for heavier reasoning and generation tasks.
deepseekV4Pro.formula: Text total cost = cache miss input tokens / 1M × US$0.435 + cache hit input tokens / 1M × US$0.003625 + output tokens / 1M × US$0.87

doubaoSeed20Pro.label: Doubao text
doubaoSeed20Pro.note: Online inference pricing for input length [0,32k]. Longer input/output tiers increase by segment; cached output starts at ¥0.64/1M tokens.
doubaoSeed20Pro.formula: Text total cost = input tokens / 1M × ¥3.20 + output tokens / 1M × ¥16.00; cached input uses tokens / 1M × ¥0.017

doubaoSeedream50Lite.label: Image generation
doubaoSeedream50Lite.note: The official page charges by successfully generated images. Multi-image jobs are billed by actual outputs; blocked or failed outputs are not charged.
doubaoSeedream50Lite.formula: Image total cost = successful output images × ¥0.22

doubaoSeedance20Fast.label: Fast video
doubaoSeedance20Fast.note: Official token-based pricing. Seedance 2.0 fast does not support 1080p output. Examples are 16:9, 5-second output without input video. Exact usage comes from API usage.completion_tokens.
doubaoSeedance20Fast.formula: Cost = token unit price × (input video seconds + output video seconds) × output width × output height × frame rate / 1024

doubaoSeedance20.label: High-quality video
doubaoSeedance20.note: Official token-based pricing. Without input video, 480p/720p are ¥46/1M tokens, 1080p is ¥51/1M tokens, and 4K is ¥26/1M tokens. Examples are 16:9, 5-second output.
doubaoSeedance20.formula: Cost = token unit price × (input video seconds + output video seconds) × output width × output height × frame rate / 1024

resultHints.recoverableDownload: The video was generated, but the server could not download it. Download it again.
resultHints.failed: Task failed. You can retry the original task.
resultHints.pending: The final video and report will appear after the task completes

errors.generationFailed: Generation failed. Check your video model settings and try again.
errors.referenceImageUnavailable: Reference image {{index}} cannot be used for generation right now. Re-upload it, or delete it and use another image.
errors.tooManyReferenceImagesWithCount: Too many reference images: Seedance supports at most {{max}} images. This task has {{count}}. Generation will use the first {{used}} images only; reorder or remove extras and try again.
errors.tooManyReferenceImages: Too many reference images: Seedance supports at most {{max}} images. Generation will use the first {{used}} images only; reorder or remove extras and try again.
errors.referenceSensitive: A reference image may contain a real person, face, or private information, so the video provider rejected the request. Remove images with people or faces and retry with product-only images.
errors.videoApiKeyMissing: No video model API key is configured. Configure or choose a video model service in API Settings before generating video.
errors.outputDownloadTimeout: The video was generated, but the server timed out while downloading the final file. Click Download Again; repeated failures may indicate unstable network access to the video file server.
errors.providerNetworkTimeout: The video provider request timed out or failed on the network. Try again later; if it keeps failing, check the video model settings and reference image links.
errors.rateLimited: The video provider is receiving requests too frequently or has rate-limited this account. Try again later.
errors.providerQuota: The video provider account has insufficient quota or an abnormal balance. Check the Volcengine/Seedance account quota and try again.
errors.providerBilling: The video provider account is overdue or has an abnormal balance. Check the Volcengine/Seedance billing and balance before retrying.
errors.promptTooLong: The prompt is too long and the video provider rejected the request. Shorten the product description, selling points, or storyboard before retrying.
errors.internalRule: The video provider rejected this generation by internal policy. Start with the reference images: remove people, faces, QR codes, contact details, unclear brand authorization, or overly revealing images; then shorten claims and storyboard wording before retrying.

providerUsage.title: Official Usage
providerUsage.empty: The official API returned no matching tasks
providerUsage.initial: Refresh official usage to show recent tasks for reconciliation
providerUsage.taskNote: Querying a task does not create video; the official list usually keeps only the most recent 7 days.
providerUsage.usageNote: Querying official usage only sends GET requests and does not create video.

reference.title: References
reference.generateDisabledTitle: Organize the fact pack before generating references
reference.generateDisabledToast: Organize the fact pack before generating references.
reference.emptyHint: Reference images guide the product appearance, materials, and camera details. Drag or paste images here.

storyboard.title: Storyboard
storyboard.subtitle: Optional. Leave blank to generate from product facts.

scene: Show the real usage environment and the full product appearance.
Move into a close usage action so the product naturally becomes the focus.
Show material, size, structure, and hand-operation details.
Return to the full usage scene and show the result and whole product.
painPoint: Start with the inconvenience or pain point before using the product.
Cut to the product appearing and quickly solving the core problem.
Use close shots to reinforce the key benefit and operation process.
Show the easier end state and the whole product.
benefit: Open directly on the most important benefit and result.
Use close shots to explain the structure or material behind that benefit.
Cut through the usage process and show multiple advantages in sequence.
End with color, full-product, or multi-angle shots to reinforce the buying reason.
ugc: Open handheld or first-person, as if a real user just received the product.
Show and try the product with natural actions and first impressions.
Capture details, material, and small discoveries during use.
Close with an authentic after-use reaction shot.
unboxing: Start from the package or tabletop with a clean pre-unboxing frame.
Open the package and take out the product so it naturally enters the shot.
Show accessories, material, size, and key details in sequence.
Place the product into a simple usage scene to finish the unboxing.
